strings.panel.p1.bubble.right.html: The damsel in distress? She's standing over in the corner of the room.
strings.panel.p2.bubble.center.html: Oh wow! She is indeed a vision in minimal pixelage.
strings.panel.p3.bubble.left.html: Um, I thought you'd be tied up or something.
strings.panel.p3.bubble.right.html: You wish. You know it's my job to stand here and get rescued, just like it's your job to be controlled by the player.
strings.panel.p4.bubble.center.html: Just like it's my job to kill you. ...Repeatedly.
